# notify_post | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Darwin Notify ](/documentation/darwinnotify)

Function# notify_post

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
extern uint32_t notify_post(const char *name);
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_post#Discussion)

Post a notification for a name.

This is the only call that is required for a notification producer. Returns status.
